Inflation Calculator

Calculate how inflation affects the value of money over time. Enter an amount and time period to see its equivalent purchasing power.

FAQ

What is inflation?

Inflation is the rate at which the general level of prices rises, reducing the purchasing power of money over time.

What is a good inflation rate?

Most central banks target around 2% annual inflation as healthy for economic growth. Higher rates erode savings faster.

How does inflation affect savings?

If your savings earn less interest than the inflation rate, your money loses real purchasing power over time.
